case_title: MICHAEL S. SCOTTO VS. BRUSCO TUG & BARGE INCORPORATED et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE MEDIATION SET FOR JAN-12-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JURY FEES, TRAN # B8204C17J003, TAG # 011006, RECEIPT NUMBER 025747, DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTTO, MICHAEL S.

DISCOVERY, 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PHYSICAL EXAMINATION OF PLAINTIFF AFTER DISCOVERY CUT-OFF IS DENIED AS THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT DILIGENT IN SEEKING THE EXAMINATION AND THE REASONS OFFERED FOR THE LATE REQUEST DO NOT CONSTITUTE GOOD CAUSE. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
